title: Violations; penalty
doc_html:
§483.  Violations; penalty

Whoever violates this Sub-part shall be fined not less than one hundred dollars nor more than five hundred dollars, or imprisoned not less than thirty days nor more than one year, or both.
doc_text:
§483.  Violations; penalty
Whoever violates this Sub-part shall be fined not less than one hundred dollars nor more than five hundred dollars, or imprisoned not less than thirty days nor more than one year, or both.
